description: PM 调度中心 — PM 评估后并行派发所有角色，全部完成后回 PM

execute.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir=process.cwd();const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,'.team/config.json'),'utf8'));const goal=(cfg.goal&&cfg.goal.description)||'(no goal)';const gapsDir=path.join(dir,'.team/gaps');let summary='';if(fs.existsSync(gapsDir)){fs.readdirSync(gapsDir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')).forEach(f=>{try{const g=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(gapsDir,f),'utf8'));summary+=f.replace('.json','')+': '+g.match+'%
'}catch{}})}const out='# Goal Status

## Goal
'+goal+'

## Current Match
'+summary;fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'.team/goal-status.md'),out);console.log(out)"

exit.condition: todoCount == 0 && designedTasks == 0 && reviewCount == 0 && inProgressCount == 0 && testingCount == 0 && blockedCount == 0
